test_cases.name: 网卡驱动故障
test_cases.log_content:
[2024-01-15 14:23:45] [KERNEL] eth0: link down
[2024-01-15 14:23:46] [KERNEL] eth0: link up, 1000Mbps, full duplex
[2024-01-15 14:23:47] [KERNEL] igb 0000:01:00.0: eth0: igb: eth0 NIC Link is Down
[2024-01-15 14:24:01] [KERNEL] igb 0000:01:00.0: eth0: igb: eth0 NIC Link is Up 1000 Mbps Full Duplex, Flow Control: RX/TX
[2024-01-15 14:24:15] [KERNEL] eth0: link down
[2024-01-15 14:24:20] [KERNEL] eth0: link up
[2024-01-15 14:24:35] [KERNEL] igb 0000:01:00.0: eth0: Reset adapter
[2024-01-15 14:24:40] [KERNEL] igb 0000:01:00.0: eth0: igb: eth0 NIC Link is Down
[2024-01-15 14:25:00] [SYSTEMD] network.service: Main process exited, code=exited, status=1/FAILURE

expected_analysis.root_cause: 网络接口频繁掉线，可能原因：网卡驱动故障、物理连接问题、硬件故障
suggested_actions: 检查网线连接和交换机端口
更新网卡驱动程序
检查网卡硬件状态
查看网卡统计信息（ethtool -S eth0）
考虑更换网卡硬件

test_cases.name: 磁盘I/O错误
test_cases.log_content:
[2024-01-15 10:30:12] [KERNEL] ata1.00: exception Emask 0x0 SAct 0x0 SErr 0x0 action 0x6 frozen
[2024-01-15 10:30:12] [KERNEL] ata1.00: failed command: READ FPDMA QUEUED
[2024-01-15 10:30:12] [KERNEL] ata1.00: cmd 60/00:00:1f:a9:c0/00:00:00:00:00/40 tag 0 ncq 4096 in
[2024-01-15 10:30:12] [KERNEL] res 40/00:01:00:00:00/00:00:00:00:00/00 Emask 0x4 (timeout)
[2024-01-15 10:30:12] [KERNEL] ata1.00: status: { DRDY }
[2024-01-15 10:30:15] [KERNEL] sd 0:0:0:0: [sda] tag#0 FAILED Result: hostbyte=DID_OK driverbyte=DRIVER_OK
[2024-01-15 10:30:15] [KERNEL] sd 0:0:0:0: [sda] tag#0 CDB: Read(16) 88 00 00 00 00 00 c0 a9 1f 00 00 00 00 10 00
[2024-01-15 10:30:15] [KERNEL] blk_update_request: I/O error, dev sda, sector 3232025984
[2024-01-15 10:30:20] [SYSTEMD] systemd[1]: dev-sda.device: Job dev-sda.device/start timed out.

expected_analysis.root_cause: 磁盘读取超时，ATA命令失败，可能原因：磁盘坏道、磁盘控制器故障、数据线问题
suggested_actions: 立即备份重要数据
运行 smartctl 检查磁盘健康状态
执行坏道扫描（badblocks）
检查磁盘连接线和电源
考虑更换磁盘

test_cases.name: 内存错误
test_cases.log_content:
[2024-01-15 08:15:23] [KERNEL] EDAC MC0: 1 CE memory read error on CPU0_DIMM0 (channel:0 slot:0 page:0x12345678 offset:0x123 grain:32 syndrome:0x0)
[2024-01-15 08:15:30] [KERNEL] EDAC MC0: 1 CE memory read error on CPU0_DIMM0 (channel:0 slot:0 page:0x12345679 offset:0x456 grain:32 syndrome:0x0)
[2024-01-15 08:15:45] [KERNEL] EDAC MC0: 1 UE memory read error on CPU0_DIMM1 (channel:0 slot:1 page:0x12345680 offset:0x789 grain:8 syndrome:0x0)
[2024-01-15 08:16:00] [KERNEL] mce: [Hardware Error]: Machine check events logged
[2024-01-15 08:16:01] [KERNEL] mce: [Hardware Error]: CPU 0: Machine Check Exception: 4 Bank 5: b200000000070f0f
[2024-01-15 08:16:01] [KERNEL] mce: [Hardware Error]: RIP 10:ffffffff8a012345
[2024-01-15 08:16:01] [KERNEL] mce: [Hardware Error]: TSC 123456789012345 ADDR 1234567890 PROCESSOR 0:0 TIME 1234567890
[2024-01-15 08:16:05] [KERNEL] Kernel panic - not syncing: Hardware Fatal Error

expected_analysis.root_cause: 内存模块出现可纠正错误（CE）和不可纠正错误（UE），导致系统崩溃
suggested_actions: 立即更换故障内存条
运行内存诊断工具（memtest86+）
检查内存插槽和连接
更新BIOS/UEFI固件
查看内存兼容性列表

test_cases.name: 防火墙连接追踪表溢出
test_cases.log_content:
[2024-01-15 16:45:30] [KERNEL] nf_conntrack: table full, dropping packet
[2024-01-15 16:45:31] [KERNEL] nf_conntrack: table full, dropping packet
[2024-01-15 16:45:32] [KERNEL] nf_conntrack: table full, dropping packet
[2024-01-15 16:45:35] [KERNEL] nf_conntrack: nf_conntrack: table full, dropping packet
[2024-01-15 16:45:40] [NETFILTER] conntrack: nf_conntrack: nf_conntrack: nf_conntrack: table full, dropping packet
[2024-01-15 16:46:00] [SYSTEMD] conntrack.service: Failed with result 'timeout'
[2024-01-15 16:46:05] [AUDIT] type=NETFILTER_PKT msg=audit(1234567890.123:456): table=nat chain=OUTPUT packet=DROP

expected_analysis.root_cause: 连接追踪表已满，可能原因：遭受DDoS攻击、网络流量异常增大、连接追踪表配置过小
suggested_actions: 检查当前连接追踪表大小（cat /proc/sys/net/netfilter/nf_conntrack_count）
临时增大连接追踪表（echo 262144 > /proc/sys/net/netfilter/nf_conntrack_max）
分析异常连接来源（conntrack -L | grep ESTABLISHED）
检查是否遭受DDoS攻击
优化防火墙规则，减少需要追踪的连接
永久修改配置文件（/etc/sysctl.conf）

test_cases.name: SSH暴力破解攻击
test_cases.log_content:
[2024-01-15 22:10:15] [SSH] Failed password for invalid user admin from 192.168.1.100 port 52341 ssh2
[2024-01-15 22:10:16] [SSH] Failed password for invalid user admin from 192.168.1.100 port 52342 ssh2
[2024-01-15 22:10:17] [SSH] Failed password for invalid user root from 192.168.1.100 port 52343 ssh2
[2024-01-15 22:10:18] [SSH] Failed password for invalid user root from 192.168.1.100 port 52344 ssh2
[2024-01-15 22:10:19] [SSH] Failed password for invalid user test from 192.168.1.100 port 52345 ssh2
[2024-01-15 22:10:20] [SSH] Failed password for invalid user test from 192.168.1.100 port 52346 ssh2
[2024-01-15 22:10:21] [SSH] Failed password for invalid user user from 192.168.1.100 port 52347 ssh2
[2024-01-15 22:10:22] [SSH] Connection closed by 192.168.1.100 port 52347 [preauth]
[2024-01-15 22:10:25] [AUDIT] type=USER_LOGIN msg=audit(1234567890.123:789): pid=12345 uid=0 auid=4294967295 ses=4294967295 msg='op=login acct="root" exe="/usr/sbin/sshd" hostname=192.168.1.100 addr=192.168.1.100 terminal=ssh res=failed'

expected_analysis.root_cause: 检测到来自IP 192.168.1.100的SSH暴力破解攻击，尝试多个用户名和密码组合
suggested_actions: 立即封禁攻击源IP（iptables -A INPUT -s 192.168.1.100 -j DROP）
安装并配置fail2ban进行自动防护
修改SSH配置：禁用root登录、修改默认端口、启用密钥认证
查看是否有成功登录的记录（grep 'Accepted password' /var/log/auth.log）
检查系统用户列表，删除可疑账户
启用SSH登录通知和监控

test_cases.name: CPU温度过高
test_cases.log_content:
[2024-01-15 15:30:45] [KERNEL] coretemp coretemp.0: Core 0: temperature above threshold, cpu clock throttled
[2024-01-15 15:30:45] [KERNEL] coretemp coretemp.0: Core 1: temperature above threshold, cpu clock throttled
[2024-01-15 15:30:46] [KERNEL] coretemp coretemp.0: Core 2: temperature above threshold, cpu clock throttled
[2024-01-15 15:30:46] [KERNEL] coretemp coretemp.0: Core 3: temperature above threshold, cpu clock throttled
[2024-01-15 15:30:50] [KERNEL] CPU: Core temperature is too high! (85C)
[2024-01-15 15:30:55] [SYSTEMD] thermald.service: Main process exited, code=exited, status=1/FAILURE
[2024-01-15 15:31:00] [KERNEL] CPU: Temperature above threshold, cpu clock throttled (total events = 1234)

expected_analysis.root_cause: CPU温度过高，可能原因：散热系统故障、风扇故障、散热硅脂老化、环境温度过高
suggested_actions: 检查CPU风扇是否正常运转
清理散热器和风扇灰尘
重新涂抹散热硅脂
检查机箱散热和风道设计
查看CPU使用率，关闭高负载进程
检查环境温度和机箱位置
考虑升级散热系统

metadata.description: 网络安全设备日志分析测试用例集
